title: helleborus × belcheri
intro: Helleborus × belcheri, also known as the Christmas rose, is a hybrid flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is prized for its nodding, bell-shaped flowers that bloom in shades of white, pink, and purple from late winter to early spring. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been reported to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Helleborus × belcheri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and supporting respiratory health.
